note: Alpha posts are RPA batch logs ([RPA - Initial Separation - DD/MM/YYYY]). Judicial 'case' signals are usually :warning: lines: 'Ofício ID …, tipo Bloqueio|Desbloqueio|… não encontrado…'. CNJ process numbers, macro IDs, APIs, Drive links, and Carta-Resposta template steps are not present in these bot messages; execution detail is typically in attached Relatorio_Execucao_*.docx files (Slack file IDs in thread).
grouping_rules: BLOQUEIO = thread sampled as Bloqueio-heavy and no Desbloqueio in prior reads. DESBLOQUEIO = Desbloqueio present and no Bloqueio in prior reads. OTHER_UNCLEAR = mixed Bloqueio+Desbloqueio, outros/transferência/SID-only, partial pagination, or no judicial tipo in retrieved lines.

BLOQUEIO.rationale: Multiple tipo Bloqueio warnings in sampled messages (session transcript).
Multiple tipo Bloqueio warnings in sampled pages.

DESBLOQUEIO.rationale: Search/thread sampling showed Desbloqueio warnings without paired Bloqueio in those pulls.

OTHER_UNCLEAR.rationale: Mixed Bloqueio and Desbloqueio warnings in same thread.
Very large thread; only partial pages captured in session—tipo mix not fully enumerated.
Mixed Bloqueio and Desbloqueio in sampled pages.
Only '*Processo Iniciado*' child seen; no Bloqueio/Desbloqueio text in retrieved lines.
Same long thread contains both tipo Bloqueio and tipo Desbloqueio warnings (paginated reads).
Contains both Bloqueio and Desbloqueio warnings in merged pages.
Contains Bloqueio and multiple Desbloqueio warnings in head segment.

fields_not_in_slack_bot_text.processo_cnj: Not emitted in these Alpha lines.
fields_not_in_slack_bot_text.drive_links: Not present; only Slack-hosted Relatorio_Execucao_*.docx attachments.
fields_not_in_slack_bot_text.carta_resposta_generation: Not described in bot thread text.
